news.headline: Oil prices jump more than 3% after Iran supreme leader says uranium must remain in country
news.summary: Iran's enriched uranium standoff complicates U.S. peace talks; Strait of Hormuz remains blocked.

news.headline: Quantum stocks soar as U.S. reportedly plans $2 billion 'award' and taking equity stakes
news.summary: Quantum computing shares pop on reports of U.S. government grants to nine firms.

news.headline: Walmart issues worse-than-expected outlook as high gas prices hit shoppers
news.summary: Walmart CFO cites elevated gas prices offsetting higher tax returns.

news.headline: Retail investors get direct access to SpaceX IPO through major brokerage platforms
news.summary: SpaceX public offering opens to everyday traders, breaking Wall Street exclusivity.

summary: 美股周三强劲反弹（降息预期+原油回落+中东局势缓和），道指涨1.3%突破50000点。今日盘前期货小幅回落。原油因地缘冲突加剧本周持续上涨，WTI逼近$102。黄金小跌。比特币$77,500附近窄幅震荡。量子计算板块受美国补贴消息大涨。
